name: Everyday Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk over bread crumbs and let sit for a few minutes to soak.
2. Add ground beef, eggs, onion, sage, salt, and pepper to the bread crumb mixture. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Shape the meat mixture into a loaf and place it in a loaf pan.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 50 minutes.
5. Optionally, spread catsup or barbecue sauce over the top of the meatloaf before baking.
6. Potatoes can be baked in the same oven at the same time by starting them 15 minutes before the meatloaf.
